tasks.subject: Task 1: EntityEditPageDef spec class + model wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Introduce `EntityEditPageDef`, `EntityEditPageDefBuilder`, and wire them into `EntityDetailViewDefBuilder`, `AbstractSpec`, and `ModelDef`.

**Files:**
- Create: `maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/EntityEditPageDef.kt`
- Create: `maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/builders/EntityEditPageDefBuilder.kt`
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/builders/EntityDetailViewDefBuilder.kt`
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/AbstractSpec.kt`
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/ModelDef.kt`

**Verify:** `./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-spec:build` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/EntityEditPageDef.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/builders/EntityEditPageDefBuilder.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/builders/EntityDetailViewDefBuilder.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/AbstractSpec.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/ModelDef.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-spec:build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EntityEditPageDef computes correct angular component names", "entityDetailView { withEditPage { ... } } registers in modelDef.entityEditPageDefs", "ModelDef.hasEditEntityPage helper works", "spec build passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Remove HasEditEntityPage and update blotter edit navigation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete the `HasEditEntityPage` flag and all usages; update `CrudBlotterComponentRenderer` to derive `hasEditEntityPage` from the model.

**Files:**
- Delete: `HasEditEntityPage.kt`
- Modify: `CrudDef.kt`, `CrudDefBuilder.kt`, `EntityDef.kt`, `BlotterDef.kt`, `BlotterSourceDef.kt`, `EsDocDef.kt`, `CrudBlotterComponentRenderer.kt`, `AngularUiModuleGenerator.kt`

**Verify:** `./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-generator:build` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/flags/HasEditEntityPage.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/CrudDef.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/builders/CrudDefBuilder.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/EntityDef.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/BlotterDef.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/BlotterSourceDef.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/EsDocDef.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/ui/CrudBlotterComponentRenderer.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/generator/AngularUiModuleGenerator.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-generator:build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HasEditEntityPage.kt deleted", "CrudBlotterComponentRenderer takes hasEditEntityPage constructor param", "renderCrudBlotters() computes hasEditEntityPage from modelDef", "generator build passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Update showcase spec, delete manual files, regenerate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update `MaiaShowcaseSpec`, delete 5 manual files, update route, run generation, verify output.

**Files:**
- Modify: `MaiaShowcaseSpec.kt`, `app.routes.ts`
- Delete: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/pages/simple-edit/` (5 files)

**Verify:** `./gradlew :maia-showcase:maia-showcase-ui:maiaGeneration` + 5 generated files present

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-showcase/spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/showcase/MaiaShowcaseSpec.kt", "maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/app.routes.ts"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew :maia-showcase:maia-showcase-ui:maiaGeneration && ls maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/generated/typescript/main/app/gen-components/org/maiaframework/showcase/simple/ | grep edit-form", "acceptanceCriteria": ["maiaGeneration produces 5 edit form generated files", "generated form uses input.required not MAT_DIALOG_DATA", "blotter onEdit navigates via router", "route points to SimpleEntityEditFormPage"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
